activity_text: Guided journaling: Write down 3 small things that went okay or brought a tiny smile today.
Curated playlist check: Put on your favorite upbeat song or watch a short comedy clip.
Reach out to a friendly face: send a text or call someone you trust to say hello.
Light physical grounding: Take a 10-minute mindful walk around the room or stretch.
Guided box breathing exercise: Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s. Repeat 3 times.
Write it out, don't send it: Vent your raw thoughts into a text box, then clear it completely.
Physical energy release: Do a quick burst of jumping jacks or press cold water on your hands.
Short meditation session: Follow a 2-minute breath grounding cycle to quiet your focus.
Break it down: Generate a mini to-do list containing ONLY the next single smallest step.
Perform the 5-4-3-2-1 grounding technique to refocus on your current surroundings.
Save the spark: Note down exactly what made today good so you can recall it later.
Ripple the joy: Message a friend to share your good mood or log a snapshot of this moment.
Set a power nap timer: take a 15-20 minute restorative shut-eye break.
Hydrate and refresh: Drink a large glass of cold water and stretch your shoulders.
Maintain your space: Take a 3-minute pause to sit in silence and enjoy this calm state.
